english: He wrote down a long list of items.
target: A long list of items, down he wrote.
before: "A long list of items, he wrote down, he did."
after: A long list of items, he wrote down.

english: The duke left the park in a silver coach.
target: Left the park in a silver coach, the duke did.
before: "A silver coach, the duke left in, he did."
after: In a silver coach, the duke left the park, he did.

english: A siege will crack the strong defense.
target: Crack the strong defense, a siege will.
before: "A siege, the strong defense will crack."
after: Crack the strong defense, a siege will.
